meta.description: An identifiable closure, blockade, or interruption of traffic, services, or operations. Includes road closures, blockades (protests), and suspension of services or operations. Each closure/interruption is a specific occurrence distinguishable by its location and date — not a general overview or trend, it can be an e.g. nation wide closure/blockage in many places. Extracted from news articles and social media.

example.description: Farmers block the highway Mexico-Queretaro at km 120 demanding water subsidies.
example.context: The blockade started at 6am and has caused traffic delays of over 2 hours. Negotiations are underway with state authorities.

date_range.mention: desde las 6 de la manana de hoy

example.cause: Demanda de subsidios de agua para agricultores
example.duration_mention: desde las 6am, sin hora de termino estimada

event_type.description: Type of closure or interruption. Choose the single most specific category that matches.

description.description: Brief description of the closure or interruption.

context.description: Contextual information: negotiations, related demands, historical context.

relevance.description: Relevance within the article: 1 = main topic, 2 = secondary, 3 = implicit.

date_range.description: Date or date range of the closure or interruption. Extract the start datetime and, if present, the end datetime.

location.description: Location of the closure or interruption.

affected_routes.description: Description of affected roads, routes, or services.

cause.description: Reason for the closure or interruption.

duration_mention.description: Mentioned or estimated duration of the interruption.

responsible_party.description: Group or entity causing or managing the closure.
